title: AgroStar is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: AgroStar is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
AgroStar invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About AgroStar:
AgroStar is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AgroStar!
